channel.title: Defi on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Defi on Pi Stack

item.title: 7 Emerging Solana Projects from Kazakhstan You Should Watch in 2026
item.description: The Central Asian crypto scene is exploding, and Kazakhstan has quietly become a Solana powerhouse. While most Western attention focuses on US and EU builders, a cluster of Kazakh projects are shipping real products on Solana—from DeFi yield optimizers to AI-powered trading agents.
